---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or an improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement

<!-- What problem or friction are you trying to solve? Who feels it, and when? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the shape of the change you'd like to see. UI sketches or example
      flows are welcome but not required. -->

## Why now

<!-- What makes this worth doing now vs. later? Is it blocking a workflow,
      unblocking a wider change, or unlocking a new use-case? -->
